title: Historical Post-Sync Workstation Migration Readiness Reassessment
historical_note: This packet records one bounded Olares Phase 5 post-sync workstation-migration readiness reassessment slice from before the canonical repo boundary moved to `C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform` on 2026-05-07. It remains packet-history provenance, not a live execution instruction for current repo operations.
current_routing: use PROJECT_STATUS.md for the current residue-retirement lane and latest completed packets
use docs/architecture/OLARES-PUBLICATION-BOUNDARY-RETIREMENT-DEPENDENCY-INVENTORY-2026-05-06.md for the remaining post-cutover boundary closeout queue
use this packet JSON only when historical provenance is needed for the earlier `olares-phase-5-011` post-sync workstation-migration readiness reassessment slice
objective: Perform the bounded repo-technical-authority reassessment that may follow Packet 010, using the published parent-root commit and synchronized `/home/olares/code/apex` mirror evidence to determine whether the workstation-migration lane is conditionally ready for a later bounded trial posture without approving migration, widening scope into services or hosting, or mutating the preserved old clone.
active_role: Olares Post-Sync Workstation Migration Readiness Assessor
dependency_note: Packet 009 defined the repo-parity gate and Packet 010 executes it. This packet is authored in advance so the next authority reassessment lane is ready once Packet 010 proves the bounded publication and host-mirror synchronization result.
required_inputs: A completed Packet 010 handoff recording the bounded publication scope, published commit hash, and post-sync `/home/olares/code/apex` evidence
The Packet 009 publication-state gate and migration-gate decision
The Packet 008 host dev-loop smoke evidence for workspace-open viability at `/home/olares/code/apex/apex-power-ops-platform`
The controlling authority-doc restatements in `Infrastructure/Olares_Workspace_Authority_Framework.md` and `Infrastructure/Olares_Build_Guide.md`
constrained_outputs: A dated reassessment handoff deciding whether the workstation-migration lane remains not ready or becomes conditionally ready for a later bounded trial posture
A recorded statement of whether `TASK-021`, `TASK-023`, or `TASK-025` need any status change after Packet 010
No migration approval, no host runtime mutation, no old-clone mutation, and no widening into AI-services, Gitea/code-hosting, or canonical-hosting work
validation_steps: Verify that Packet 010 completed with a bounded published parent-root commit and post-sync `/home/olares/code/apex` evidence showing branch, remote, commit, and cleanliness.
Confirm the synchronized host mirror contains the controlling Phase 5 authority artifacts, including Packet 009, current routing, roadmap evidence, and the authority-doc restatements.
Reassess whether the workstation-migration lane is still blocked or is now conditionally ready for a later bounded trial posture, while keeping migration itself unapproved.
State whether `TASK-021`, `TASK-023`, and `TASK-025` remain unchanged or require narrow status restatement.
Preserve the split decision surfaces: no AI-services expansion, no Gitea/code-hosting transition, no canonical-hosting transition, and no host-runtime mutation.

Stop if Packet 010 has not completed cleanly, if repo parity remains ambiguous, or if execution would require migration approval, service changes, auth or ingress changes, or any mutation of `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes reassessment only. It does not authorize database writes, host-runtime mutation, old-clone mutation, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting changes, or migration approval.
closure_note: Executed after Packet 010 proved the repo-parity gate was satisfied through bounded publication and host-mirror synchronization. The reassessment classifies the workstation-migration lane as conditionally ready for a later bounded trial posture, without approving full migration.
next_action: Use the Packet 011 handoff as controlling input for bounded Olares host trial-posture planning. Do not treat conditional trial readiness as full migration approval.
